basics.name: Mahanaz Syed
basics.label: Biomedical/Health Informatics Researcher
basics.summary: Biomedical informatics researcher with more than a decade of experience across the full span of healthcare data, from operational systems and data warehousing to research informatics. Work focuses on standardizing disparate clinical data and applying artificial intelligence, machine learning, and natural language processing to extract and harmonize high-value information from electronic health records.

work.name: UT Health San Antonio
work.summary: Lead AI- and standards-based research informatics, including an NIH/NCATS K12 mentored research program.

work.name: University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences
work.position: Research Data Analyst, Clinical Data Warehouse
work.summary: Built and maintained clinical data warehouse infrastructure integrating heterogeneous EHR and registry data for research.
